messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Checking. Looks like POST /payments/{id}/refund returns HTTP 200 but refund_status stays as 'pending'. Investigating.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Found the issue: Exception in Stripe API call was silently caught and swallowed by a bare except:.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
